如果 dgbartaia 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 dgbartaia 的方法：

原文:

Once suspended, dgbartaia will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, dgbartaia will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by dgbartaia will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If dgbartaia is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag dgbartaia:

dgbartaia consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging dgbartaia will restore default visibility to their posts.
Items.Author: dgbartaia

Items.Title: 人工智能如何影响机器人技术？ | How AI effects Robotics?
Items.Description:
巴吉特·辛格

发表于 3 月 10 日

人工智能 (AI) 对机器人技术产生了重大影响，使机器人变得更加智能、适应性和自主性。 以下是人工智能影响机器人技术的一些方式：

增强感知：人工智能算法可以帮助机器人通过传感器、摄像头和其他数据输入来识别和理解其环境，使它们能够更有效地导航和与世界互动。

改进决策制定：人工智能使机器人能够分析和解释数据、从经验中学习，并根据这些数据做出决策，而无需人工干预。 点击继续

一旦暂停，baljeet975 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，baljeet975 将可以再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，baljeet975 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 baljeet975 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

原文:

Baljeet Singh

Posted on Mar 10

Artificial Intelligence (AI) has a significant impact on Robotics, enabling robots to become more intelligent, adaptable, and autonomous. Here are some ways that AI is affecting robotics:

Enhanced perception: AI algorithms can help robots recognize and understand their environment through sensors, cameras, and other data inputs, enabling them to navigate and interact with the world more effectively.

Improved decision-making: AI enables robots to analyze and interpret data, learn from experience, and make decisions based on that data, without human intervention. click to continue

Muhammad Sifat Hossain - Feb 14

Md Mostafizur Rahman - Mar 5
